'''鈭歠-p-zh-h''' ('''kafapzhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:precharge|precharge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:precharge|precharge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-p-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafapzhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifapzhehoko|thifapzhehoko]] || [[word:jifapzhehoko|jifapzhehoko]] || [[word:shifapzhehoko|shifapzhehoko]] || [[word:kifapzhehoko|kifapzhehoko]]
|-
